gist.headline: Bridging the API gap
gist.blurb: A new community tool just dropped! pollinations2openai acts as a bridge, letting you plug our image generation straight into your existing OpenAI workflows.
gist.summary: Added the community-built pollinations2openai tool to the developer tools showcase, bridging Pollinations image generation with OpenAI APIs.
gist.impact: Developers can now seamlessly drop Pollinations image generation into any app or workflow that already speaks the OpenAI API format.
gist.visual_concept: A bridge connecting two systems. Polly the bee handing a glowing image across a small bridge to the Monitor Robot (representing the OpenAI API integration). Cozy, friendly collaboration.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot flying across a small wooden bridge, handing a glowing picture frame to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
